This selection applies across the whole app.
Wähle, welche Elemente auf dem Spielfeld: Choose which elements are shown on the board.
Schafe, Kakteen, Scheunen, Ziegelstapel: Sheep, cacti, barns, brick stacks, and other field props.
Detaillierte Boden- und Oberflächenstruk: Detailed ground and surface textures on the tiles.
Berge, Bäume, Dünen und andere Höhenform: Mountains, trees, dunes, and other terrain relief are layered on top.
Zeigt die Ressourcensymbole direkt auf d: Shows resource icons directly on the tile markers.
Nach oben zu Hexagonia: Back to the top of Hexagonia
Modernes Tabletop-Strategy im Browser: Modern tabletop strategy in the browser
Room code {code} is waiting for your login.
Nach Anmeldung oder Registrierung spring: After signing in or registering, you will jump directly into the target lobby.
Hexagonia bringt Strategie und Handel in: Hexagonia brings strategy and trade to the browser.
Hol Freunde per Code oder Link an den Ti: Bring friends to the table with a code or link and start immediately. Trading, building decisions, robber phases, and development cards bring pressure and real board-game tension straight into the browser.
Hexagonia ist 100 % kostenlos und wird e: Hexagonia is 100% free and will stay that way.
Kein Abo. Keine Paywalls. Keine bezahlte: No subscription. No paywalls. No paid advantages. Ever.
Gemeinsam spielen per Code oder Link: Play together by code or link
Hexagonia setzt auf einen klaren Ablauf:: Hexagonia follows a clear flow: create a round, bring in friends, define the setup, and start together without detours.
Der Fokus liegt auf einer runden Spieler: The focus is on a tight player experience: invite friends, start a match, trade, build, and put more pressure on the other players with every decision.
Die Partie lebt von Interaktion, nicht v: The match lives from interaction, not decoration.
Hexagonia lebt von direkten Entscheidung: Hexagonia lives from direct decisions: build, trade, block, counter, and swing the match in your favor move by move.
Runden mit Sitzplätzen und Ready-State: Rounds with seats and ready state
Setup-Modi mit kontrolliertem Spielstart: Setup modes with controlled match start
Handel zwischen Spielern und über Häfen: Trading between players and through harbors
Räuber- und Abwurfphasen mit klarem Abla: Robber and discard phases with a clear flow
Entwicklungskarten und Wertungen mit ech: Development cards and awards with real turning points
Melde dich an und geh direkt an deinen T: Sign in and go straight to your table.
Erstelle ein Konto oder logg dich ein. W: Create an account or sign in. If you arrived via invite, you will land directly in the correct round afterward.
Der erkannte Code {code} wird nach dem L: The detected code {code} opens automatically after sign-in.
Code oder Link bringen euch ohne öffentl: A code or link takes you straight to the same table without any public queue.
Nach dem Login springst du direkt in Rau: After sign-in, you jump directly into room {code}.
Diese Seite ist durch reCAPTCHA geschütz: This page is protected by reCAPTCHA. The Google
Browser-Strategie für gemeinsame Runden: Browser strategy for shared rounds with friends. Free, without subscriptions, and without paywalls.
Einladen, aufbauen, handeln und direkt g: Invite, set up, trade, and play together right away.

match.tooltip.rollFirst.title: Roll first
match.tooltip.rollFirst.detail: You must start the turn with the dice roll first.
match.tooltip.unavailable.title: Unavailable right now
match.tooltip.unavailable.detail: This action is locked in the current phase.
match.tooltip.specialBuild.title: Special build phase
match.tooltip.specialBuild.detail1: Only building and buying development cards are allowed here.

match.tooltip.missingResources.title: Resources missing
match.tooltip.currentlyUnavailable.title: Currently unavailable
match.tooltip.currentlyUnavailable.detai: No development card can be bought at the moment.
match.tooltip.noLegalTarget.title: No valid build target
match.tooltip.noLegalTarget.detail: There is currently no legal target on the board for this action.
match.tooltip.selectTarget.title: Select build target
match.tooltip.selectTarget.detail: Choose a valid target directly on the board now.
match.development.status.passive.detail: Counts automatically as a hidden victory point and is not played manually.
match.development.status.nextTurn.detail: This card can only be played starting with your next own turn.
match.development.status.ready.detail: The card is prepared and can be played in your next active turn.
match.development.status.noTarget.detail: There is currently no legal free road for this card.
match.development.status.turnLimit.detai: A development card has already been played this turn.
match.development.status.playable.defaul: This development card can be played now.
match.development.status.playable.knight: Starts the robber phase immediately and counts toward largest army.
match.development.status.playable.roadBu: Lets you place up to two free roads before or after rolling.
match.development.status.playable.yearOf: Takes any two resources from the bank.
match.development.status.playable.monopo: Takes one chosen resource type from all other players.
match.cue.initialRoad.title: Place your initial road

match.cue.settlement.title: Build a settlement

match.cue.city.title: Upgrade a settlement to a city
match.cue.robber.title: Move the robber

match.camera.initialRoad.title: Place your initial road

match.camera.roadBuilding.first.detail: The camera keeps the relevant road-building area in view.

match.camera.roadBuilding.second.detail: The camera stays with the selected road-building chain.
match.camera.road.title: Build a road
match.camera.road.detail: The camera focuses the local road area.

match.turnStatus.yourAction.title: Your action
match.turnStatus.waitForPlayer.title: Waiting for {player}
match.turnStatus.gameOver.title: Match over
match.turnStatus.trade.waitingReply.open: Another player can accept your offer.
match.turnStatus.trade.answerFromYou.det: {player} is waiting for your trade decision.
match.turnStatus.pendingDiscard.detail: Discard {count} cards so that {player} can continue.
match.turnStatus.initialRoad.self: Place your adjacent initial road now.
match.turnStatus.robber.discardSelf: Discard {count} cards so the robber phase can continue.{suffix}
match.turnStatus.robber.moveDetail: Click a marked tile now to move the robber there. Only then will the robber phase continue.
match.turnStatus.robber.allDiscarded: All discards are done. The robber will be moved now.
match.turnStatus.roadBuilding.second: Choose the second free road or end the effect.
match.turnStatus.settlement.select: Choose a valid spot for your settlement.
match.turnStatus.city.select: Choose one of your settlements to upgrade.
match.turnStatus.roll.other: {player} starts the turn with the roll.
match.turnStatus.specialBuild.self: Special build phase: build or buy a development. No player trade, no maritime trade, no playing development cards.
match.turnStatus.specialBuild.noMove: No legal build or buy is available. You can pass immediately.
match.turnStatus.specialBuild.other: {player} is using the special build phase.
match.turnStatus.pairedPlayers.self: Paired Players: you are player 2. Building, maritime trade, and development cards are allowed, player trade is not.
match.turnStatus.pairedPlayers.other: {player} is currently taking the player-2 turn in Paired Players.
match.turnStatus.turnAction.self: Build, trade, or end your turn.
match.turnStatus.nextAction.title: Waiting for the next action
match.turnStatus.nextAction.detail: As soon as a legal step is available, it will be shown here.
match.confirm.initialSettlement.title: Place initial settlement?
match.confirm.initialSettlement.detail: The selected position will be placed as your initial settlement.
match.confirm.initialRoad.title: Place initial road?
match.confirm.initialRoad.detail: The selected edge will be placed as your initial road.
match.confirm.buildRoad.title: Build road?
match.confirm.buildRoad.detail: The road is built immediately and the building cost is paid.
match.confirm.buildSettlement.title: Build settlement?
match.confirm.buildSettlement.detail: The settlement is built immediately and the building cost is paid.
match.confirm.buildCity.title: Build city?
match.confirm.buildCity.detail: The selected settlement is upgraded to a city and the building cost is paid.
match.confirm.buyDevelopment.title: Buy development card?
match.confirm.buyDevelopment.detail: The resources are spent immediately and you draw a hidden development card.
match.confirm.playKnight.title: Play knight?
match.confirm.playKnight.detail: The knight is played and then you place the robber.
match.confirm.playRoadBuilding.title: Play road building?
match.confirm.playRoadBuilding.detail: The card is activated. You then place one or two free roads directly on the board.
match.confirm.placeFreeRoad.title: Place free road?
match.confirm.placeFreeRoad.detail: The selected edge will be placed as a free road from the road-building effect.
match.confirm.finishRoadBuilding.title: Finish road building?
match.confirm.finishRoadBuilding.detail: The open road-building effect is ended. You can continue playing normally afterward this turn.
match.confirm.playYearOfPlenty.title: Play year of plenty?
match.confirm.playYearOfPlenty.detail: You take {first} and {second} from the bank.
match.confirm.playMonopoly.title: Play monopoly?
match.confirm.playMonopoly.detail: All other players give you their {resource} cards.
match.confirm.moveRobber.title: Move robber?
match.confirm.moveRobber.detail: The robber will be moved to the selected tile.
match.confirm.moveRobber.detailWithTarge: The robber will be moved to the selected tile and {player} will be used as the target player.
match.confirm.trade.title: Send trade offer?
match.confirm.maritimeTrade.title: Confirm maritime trade?
match.confirm.endTurn.title: End turn?
match.confirm.endTurn.detail: After that, nothing else can be built or played this turn.
match.roadBuilding.selectFirst: Choose the first free road on the board now.
match.roadBuilding.selectSecond: Choose the second free road or end the effect.
match.legend.title: Legend
match.legend.subtitle: Resources, harbors, and hints
match.legend.resourceCompact.desert: No yield, starting tile of the robber
match.legend.hint.gold: Golden highlights mark live action and important events on the board.
match.legend.hint.pulse: Blue pulsing markers show what you can currently click or build.
match.legend.hint.port: Harbors are on the coast. Your best adjacent harbor rate from one of your own settlements or cities always applies.
match.legend.hintCompact.gold: Gold marks live events and important board moments.
match.legend.hintCompact.pulse: Blue shows valid clicks and current build targets.
match.legend.hintCompact.port: At a harbor, your best rate from an adjacent settlement or city always applies.
match.trade.target.label: Target
match.trade.submitHint.editOpenOffer: Change or withdraw the open offer first.
match.trade.submitHint.notEmpty: At least one side must contain resources.
match.trade.submitHint.maritimeOwnTurn: Only available during your own action turn.
match.trade.submitHint.noMaritimeResourc: Not enough resources for a harbor trade.
match.trade.maritime.empty: No suitable resource is currently available for this mode.
match.trade.noneVisible: There is currently no visible trade offer.
match.robberPhase.title: Robber phase
match.robberPhase.noneDone: No player has finished discarding yet.
